sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Anopin bang a nuam pen hiam
Topa phat a laam mah nuam pen
Khat leh khat khut kilen in
Topa'n thupha hong pia tahen ki ci leng.
Chorus
Hei! Anopin nuam, Gupngah ka ki tel ni buang pawh
Hei! Anopin nuam, kamtuam ka pau theih ni buang pawh
Hei! Anopin nuam, lai len tawn a ih tawn deudeu buang pawh
Hei! Anopin nuam, Zeisu lam bang ih paak buang pawh.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Topa phat in khut beng ziahziah
Etlawm maitai nuih mai siusiau,
Khat leh khat khut ki van in
Ha le-luijah, Ha le-lujah ki ci leng.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Topa phat in khut van ziahziah
Zeisu lian bellian bel ci-in
Avangliatna phawk kawmin
Shalom-shalom shalom shalom ki ci leng

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Topa phat in diang khawm ziah ziah
Taksa deih na teng sing khia in
Zeisu lianbellianbel ci-in,
Zeisu'n Zeisu'n Zeisu'n hong it kici leng.
